chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.311 of 2017 Muhammad Hanif Versus ORO Industries DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui Mr. Justice Omar Sial. Hearing (priority) case 1. For hearing of CMA No.2221/2017 (U/S-5). 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.2223/2017 (stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 11.01.2024 Ms. Rabya Javed, Advocate for the appellant. Ms. Tahira Bano, Advocate for the Respondent..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the appellant submits that without prejudice to the rights, as tentatively determined in the impugned order, they would move an application for temporary use of the design/logo. If the appellant move such application, the same shall be dealt with in accordance with law by the learned single Judge. The instant High Court Appeal has no merit and is accordingly dismissed along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
